properties.displayName: Storage accounts should use zone- or geo-redundant replication
properties.description: Enforces that storage accounts use a resilient SKU so data survives datacenter or region failures. The default allowed list accepts both zone-redundant SKUs (ZRS, GZRS, RAGZRS — synchronous copies across availability zones in the primary region) and geo-redundant SKUs (GRS, RAGRS — asynchronous replication to a paired region, but LRS within the primary region). For strict intra-region zone resiliency, restrict allowedSkus to the zone-redundant SKUs only. Supports the Reliability pillar of the Well-Architected Framework.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy.
